info.name: School Edu Sphere
info.description: Student API collection (Students, Parents, Academic Records).

exec: pm.test("Direct student has no admission reference", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().admissionDocsId).to.be.oneOf([null, undefined]); });
pm.test("Student stores the admission reference from the URL", function () { const admissionDocsId = pm.request.url.path[2]; pm.expect(pm.response.json().admissionDocsId).to.eql(admissionDocsId); });
pm.test("Converted student has an admission number", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().admissionNo).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });
